headerDisplay: Homebridge plugin for Jandy/Zodiac iAquaLink pool & spa controllers.

username.title: iAquaLink Username (Email)
username.description: The email address you use to log into the iAquaLink app.

pollingInterval.title: Polling Interval (seconds)
pollingInterval.description: How often (in seconds) to poll the iAquaLink API for device state updates. Lower values give faster response to external state changes (e.g. a pool technician tapping the panel) but hit the Jandy API more often. 30s is the default and safe for most users; 3–5s works for a single account and feels near-instant.

temperatureUnit.title: Temperature Unit
temperatureUnit.description: Override the temperature unit. If not set, the unit is detected automatically from the iAquaLink controller.
